title: Mafia Cars
description: Tired of racing cars? How about trying a classic! I introduce you a brand new (well forgotten old ones) car from the past century: Bolt Model B (Ford Model A) and Bolt Ace (Ford Model T)
body:
### **OPTIFINE REQUIRED**



Tired of racing cars? How about trying a classic! I introduce you a brand new (well forgotten old ones) car from the past century: Bolt Model B (Ford Model A) and Bolt Ace (Ford Model T)



**To get those vehicles**



_Rename bamboo raft into﻿:_


Bolt B Taxi

Bolt B Fordor Red/Green/Blue/Brown/Black/Police

Bolt B Tudor Red/Green/Blue/Brown/Black/Police

Bolt Ace Taxi

Bolt Ace Fordor Red/Green/Blue/Brown/Black

Bolt Ace Touring Red/Green/Blue/Brown/Black

Bolt B Fordor Red/Green/Blue/Brown/Black SW (Spare Wheel)

Bolt B Fordor Red/Green/Blue/Brown/Black NT (No Trunk)









_Rename bamboo raft with chest into:_



Bolt B Coupe Red/Green/Blue/Brown/Black

Bolt B Roadster Red/Green/Blue/Brown/Black

Bolt B Pickup Red/Green/Blue/Brown/Black


Bolt Ace Coupe Red/Green/Blue/Brown/Black

Bolt Ace Pickup Red/Green/Blue/Brown/Black


## New renames!!!

_bamboo raft with chest_

Bolt Ace Roadster Red/Green/Blue/Brown/Black

Bolt Ace Roadster Red/Green/Blue/Brown/Black RoofDown

Bolt B Roadster Red/Green/Blue/Brown/Black RoofDown

_bamboo raft_

Bolt Ace Touring Red/Green/Blue/Brown/Black RoofDown
